prompt: hey im at the workshop and nothing is working, how do i get this running?

assertions.text: Runs Step 0 diagnostic checks before starting setup
Checks if pnpm is installed, or correctly skips when deps already installed via pnpm
Runs pnpm install, or correctly skips when deps already installed via pnpm
Asks user for their Anthropic API key
Does not echo API key to terminal output
Verifies frontend is running by curling localhost:5173 (not just port check)
Presents both localhost:3000 and localhost:5173 URLs
Mentions available agent personas from agents/ directory after setup
Follows correct order: diagnostic -> install -> env config -> start services
